name: Rufus :- Deponia!
description:
-Accidents bring people together-

(I love his nose it's not a joke)

Hi everyone! This is my first bot, and I'm a little nervous because I've never written anything publicly before... Not even a little fanfiction back then 💔

I hope it's not as messy as I think it is, English is not my native language, although I understand it well.

I know Deponia isn't that popular, but since I've recently started playing it and there's a new game coming up, I want to give it a little attention in case any of you are interested! This game also made me absolutely fall in love with platypuses, I don't know how I never noticed them before, they are adorable!🥹💞

Besides, if you have any comments about the character's design or correct spelling, please feel free to share! I'd love to hear your feedback:)

I hope I've set it's POV correctly or what is this, I feel like an old uncle doing writing fiction/bot making stuff💔

-Ciao cocoa! 🦄🌈
creator: SAMUMKA
